zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：[震荡偏弱整理]
zh.content:
现价6.67附近震荡，略低于SMA20，结构偏弱但仍守住6.64上方，短线进入横盘整理。

MACD维持微弱正值动能但信号线未确认，RSI缺失使动量判断受限。整体成交波动收敛，多空能量均衡偏观望。

下方支撑关注6.64与6.60区域，上方阻力在6.70及6.75附近，若放量突破6.70或转向短线趋势。

操作建议以区间交易为主，靠近支撑轻仓试多，接近阻力减仓或短空，止损设于区间外防假突破。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase around the 6.65–6.70 region, with price action showing minimal volatility over the last 24 hours. The market structure suggests a neutral short-term trend, following a period of mild downside pressure that has recently stabilized. The inability to break decisively above the 6.70 zone indicates buyers are cautious, while sellers lack momentum to push price meaningfully lower.

From an indicator perspective, the MACD reading of 0.0051745416 suggests a very weak bullish bias, but the absence of a signal line value limits confirmation of trend strength. Price trading slightly below the 20-period SMA at 6.70162 reinforces a neutral-to-slightly bearish stance in the short term. Without RSI data, momentum clarity is reduced, but the current flat structure implies equilibrium between buyers and sellers.

Key support is forming near the recent session low around 6.64–6.65, which has repeatedly contained downside moves. A break below this zone could expose deeper support near 6.58 and potentially 6.50, where historical liquidity has previously accumulated. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at the 20-SMA near 6.70, followed by a stronger barrier around 6.75–6.78, where prior rejection zones have formed.

Trading conditions favor range-bound strategies until a breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support with tight risk control, targeting moves back toward 6.70–6.75. Conversely, rejection at resistance could offer scalp short opportunities. A decisive close above 6.75 would be required to shift bias toward a more sustained bullish continuation phase.
